name: denniscalazans-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Dennis Calazans

plugins.name: dc
plugins.description: Brain round trip toolkit: decode messy input, stress-test plans, distill insights, and write clean markdown

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: SonarQube-driven code quality skills for checking quality gates, browsing issues, fixing violations, verifying fixes locally, and triaging false positives

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Unified browser automation: lightweight exploration via agent-browser + Retina recording via Playwright on a shared Chrome session

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Codebase support toolkit: task lifecycle, codebase investigation, and adversarial implementation pipeline

plugins.name: integrations
plugins.description: External service connectors: Figma REST API and 1Password CLI
